# Schema.org Markup Inventory

## Overview

Complete inventory of all Schema.org JSON-LD components for SmartFinPro.com.

**Status**: ✅ All 11 required schemas implemented and Schema.org compliant

---

## 1. Organization Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/organization-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generateOrganizationSchema()`
**Type**: `Organization`
**Usage Location**: Root layout (`app/layout.tsx`)
**Rich Snippet**: Company knowledge panel

**Data Included**:
- Organization name (SmartFinPro)
- Base URL
- Logo URL
- Social media profiles (Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube)
- Contact point (email, type)

**Template**:
```tsx
<OrganizationSchema />
```

---

## 2. Website Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/website-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generateWebsiteSchema()`
**Type**: `WebSite`
**Usage Location**: Root layout (`app/layout.tsx`)
**Rich Snippet**: Website metadata

**Data Included**:
- Site name
- Base URL
- Description
- Publisher organization

**Template**:
```tsx
<WebsiteSchema />
```

---

## 3. Review Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/review-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generateReviewSchema(review)`
**Type**: `Review`
**Usage Location**: Individual review pages (MDX content)
**Rich Snippet**: ⭐ Star rating, review count, author

**Data Included**:
- Product/service name
- Review rating (1-5)
- Review count
- Author information
- Publication and modification dates
- Product category and offers
- Pros and cons (as positive/negative notes)

**Template**:
```tsx
<ReviewSchema review={reviewData} />
```

**Props**:
```typescript
interface ReviewData {
  title: string;
  description: string;
  productName: string;
  rating: number;
  reviewCount: number;
  pros: string[];
  cons: string[];
  publishDate: string;
  modifiedDate: string;
  author: string;
  // ... additional fields
}
```

---

## 4. AggregateRating Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/aggregate-rating-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generateAggregateRatingSchema(rating)`
**Type**: `AggregateRating`
**Usage Location**: Comparison pages, winner badges
**Rich Snippet**: Rating metadata

**Data Included**:
- Rating value (numeric)
- Best/worst rating (5/1)
- Review count
- Rating authority

**Template**:
```tsx
<AggregateRatingSchema ratingValue={4.8} reviewCount={1250} />
```

---

## 5. FAQPage Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/faq-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generateFAQSchema(faqs)`
**Type**: `FAQPage`
**Usage Location**: Review pages, comparison pages
**Rich Snippet**: FAQ accordion in SERPs

**Data Included**:
- Questions and answers
- Structured Q&A format
- Multiple question support

**Template**:
```tsx
<FAQSchema faqs={[
  { question: "How much?", answer: "Starting at $10/month" }
]} />
```

**Props**:
```typescript
interface FAQ {
  question: string;
  answer: string;
}
```

---

## 6. Person Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/person-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generatePersonSchema(person)`
**Type**: `Person`
**Usage Location**: Author bylines, expert profiles
**Rich Snippet**: Author knowledge panel (with multiple articles)

**Data Included**:
- Name
- Job title
- Biography
- Professional image
- Profile URL
- Affiliate associations

**Template**:
```tsx
<PersonSchema
  name="John Smith"
  jobTitle="Financial Analyst"
  description="15+ years of trading experience"
  image="/images/john-smith.jpg"
  url="https://smartfinpro.com/author/john-smith"
/>
```

---

## 7. BreadcrumbList Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/breadcrumb-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generateBreadcrumbSchema(items)`
**Type**: `BreadcrumbList`
**Usage Location**: All pages with hierarchical navigation
**Rich Snippet**: Breadcrumb navigation in SERPs

**Data Included**:
- Breadcrumb items (name, URL)
- Item position
- Hierarchical structure

**Template**:
```tsx
<BreadcrumbSchema items={[
  { name: "Home", url: "https://smartfinpro.com" },
  { name: "Trading", url: "https://smartfinpro.com/trading" },
  { name: "eToro Review", url: "https://smartfinpro.com/trading/etoro" }
]} />
```

---

## 8. HowTo Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/howto-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generateHowToSchema(howto)`
**Type**: `HowTo`
**Usage Location**: How-to guides, comparison guides, tutorials
**Rich Snippet**: Step-by-step guide in SERPs

**Data Included**:
- Guide name and description
- Estimated completion time (ISO 8601)
- Step-by-step instructions
- Step images (optional)

**Template**:
```tsx
<HowToSchema
  name="How to Choose a Broker"
  description="Complete guide to selecting the right broker"
  estimatedTime="PT15M"
  steps={[
    { name: "Check Regulations", description: "..." },
    { name: "Compare Fees", description: "..." }
  ]}
/>
```

---

## 9. FinancialProduct Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/financial-product-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generateFinancialProductSchema(product)`
**Type**: `FinancialProduct`
**Usage Location**: Broker pages, financial service reviews
**Rich Snippet**: Product knowledge panel

**Data Included**:
- Product name and brand
- Description
- Aggregate rating
- Pricing and currency
- Feature list
- Geographic availability
- Service category

**Template**:
```tsx
<FinancialProductSchema
  name="Interactive Brokers"
  description="Advanced trading platform"
  brand="Interactive Brokers LLC"
  rating={4.7}
  reviewCount={2543}
  price="0"
  priceCurrency="USD"
  features={["Commission-free", "Options", "Forex"]}
  areaServed={["US", "UK", "CA", "AU"]}
/>
```

---

## 10. Article Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/article-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generateArticleSchema(article)`
**Type**: `Article`
**Usage Location**: Blog posts, educational content, how-to articles
**Rich Snippet**: Article metadata, publication info

**Data Included**:
- Headline and description
- Publication and modification dates
- Author information
- Featured image
- Publisher organization
- Main entity of page

**Template**:
```tsx
<ArticleSchema
  title="Complete AI Tools Guide"
  description="Comprehensive review of AI tools..."
  publishDate="2024-01-15"
  modifiedDate="2024-02-20"
  author="John Doe"
  image="/images/header.jpg"
  url="https://smartfinpro.com/ai-tools-guide"
/>
```

---

## 11. ComparisonTable Schema ✅

**File**: `/components/seo/comparison-schema.tsx`
**Generated By**: `lib/seo/schema.ts` → `generateComparisonTableSchema(comparison)`
**Type**: `ComparisonTable`
**Usage Location**: Comparison matrices, side-by-side comparisons
**Rich Snippet**: Comparison context

**Data Included**:
- Comparison title
- Product names and ratings
- Pricing information
- Review counts
- Structured row/cell format

**Template**:
```tsx
<ComparisonSchema
  title="Best Trading Brokers"
  products={[
    { name: "Interactive Brokers", rating: 4.7, reviewCount: 2543, price: "0", currency: "USD" },
    { name: "TD Ameritrade", rating: 4.5, reviewCount: 1823, price: "0", currency: "USD" }
  ]}
/>
```

---

## Summary Table

| Schema | Type | Component | File | Status |
|--------|------|-----------|------|--------|
| Organization | `Organization` | OrganizationSchema | organization-schema.tsx | ✅ |
| Website | `WebSite` | WebsiteSchema | website-schema.tsx | ✅ |
| Review | `Review` | ReviewSchema | review-schema.tsx | ✅ |
| AggregateRating | `AggregateRating` | AggregateRatingSchema | aggregate-rating-schema.tsx | ✅ |
| FAQ | `FAQPage` | FAQSchema | faq-schema.tsx | ✅ |
| Person | `Person` | PersonSchema | person-schema.tsx | ✅ |
| Breadcrumb | `BreadcrumbList` | BreadcrumbSchema | breadcrumb-schema.tsx | ✅ |
| HowTo | `HowTo` | HowToSchema | howto-schema.tsx | ✅ |
| FinancialProduct | `FinancialProduct` | FinancialProductSchema | financial-product-schema.tsx | ✅ |
| Article | `Article` | ArticleSchema | article-schema.tsx | ✅ |
| Comparison | `ComparisonTable` | ComparisonSchema | comparison-schema.tsx | ✅ |

---

## Implementation Locations

### Root Layout
```tsx
// app/layout.tsx
<head>
  <OrganizationSchema />
  <WebsiteSchema />
</head>
```

### Review Pages
```tsx
// app/(marketing)/[market]/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx
<ReviewSchema review={review} />
<FAQSchema faqs={review.faqs} />
<BreadcrumbSchema items={breadcrumbs} />
<FinancialProductSchema {...product} />
```

### Comparison Pages
```tsx
// app/(marketing)/tools/broker-comparison/page.tsx
<ComparisonSchema products={products} />
{products.map(p => <FinancialProductSchema {...p} />)}
<BreadcrumbSchema items={breadcrumbs} />
```

### How-To Guides
```tsx
// app/(marketing)/tools/*/page.tsx
<HowToSchema
  name={guideName}
  description={guideDescription}
  estimatedTime={estimatedTime}
  steps={steps}
/>
<BreadcrumbSchema items={breadcrumbs} />
```

### Blog/Articles
```tsx
// Blog post pages
<ArticleSchema {...article} />
<FAQSchema faqs={faqs} />
<BreadcrumbSchema items={breadcrumbs} />
```

---

## Schema.org Compliance

All schemas follow **Schema.org v15.0** (latest) specifications:
- ✅ Valid @context values
- ✅ Correct @type definitions
- ✅ Required properties included
- ✅ Recommended properties optimized
- ✅ Valid data types and formats
- ✅ ISO 8601 date formatting
- ✅ Proper nested structures

**Validation Resources**:
- [Google Rich Results Test](https://search.google.com/test/rich-results)
- [Schema.org Validator](https://validator.schema.org/)

---

## Usage Checklist

Before deploying new pages:

- [ ] Validate schemas with Google Rich Results Test
- [ ] Confirm all required fields are populated
- [ ] Check date formats (ISO 8601)
- [ ] Verify URLs match actual page URLs
- [ ] Test on both desktop and mobile
- [ ] Wait 2-4 weeks for Google indexing
- [ ] Monitor Google Search Console for issues

---

## Performance Notes

- All schema components render as `<script type="application/ld+json">`
- No impact on page rendering or load time
- JSON-LD is parsed by search engines only
- Use server components for schema generation when possible
- Avoid rendering duplicate schemas on the same page

---

## Maintenance

- Review schemas quarterly for accuracy
- Update when content structure changes
- Add new schemas as content types evolve
- Monitor Google Search Console for schema issues
- Test with Rich Results Tool before major updates

---

**Last Updated**: February 2026
**Version**: 1.0
**All Schemas**: Schema.org Compliant ✅
